title: SOAP
description: Subjective + Objective + Goal for this shift.

fields.label: Subjective (S)
fields.helpText: Patient-reported during this shift: symptoms, complaints, mood, sleep, appetite. Bullet list. Keep negatives the patient mentioned.

fields.label: Objective (O)
fields.helpText: Nurse-observed during this shift: vital trends, exam findings, intake/output, drain output, wound status. Bullet list.

fields.label: Goal for next shift
fields.helpText: Single short line — what next shift should aim for. e.g., "Keep pain ≤ 3/10, mobilise 2× evening, maintain SpO₂ ≥ 95."

title: Shift timeline
description: Chronologically-ordered events during this shift — every medication, every check, every patient/family interaction.

fields.label: Events
fields.helpText: One row per event. Drop the row if no time was stated.

fields.label: Time
fields.helpText: HH:MM in 24-hour format. "Eight thirty AM" → 08:30. "Two PM" → 14:00.

fields.label: Type
fields.helpText: "progress" for clinical/care events (medication given, vitals taken, wound dressed, intake, output, ambulation). "education" for teaching the patient or family (warning signs, exercises, discharge instructions).

fields.label: Event
fields.helpText: One-sentence description. Include dose + route for medications. e.g., "Inj. Pantoprazole 40 mg IV given", "Educated patient on warning signs of bleeding".

title: ISBARR handover
description: Structured handover for the incoming nurse. Each field is 1–3 sentences, readable in 5 seconds.

fields.label: Situation (S)
fields.helpText: Current clinical state in one line. e.g., "Day 2 post-CABG, stable, weaning oxygen."

fields.label: Background (B)
fields.helpText: Admission context + key past history + primary problem. e.g., "Admitted 18-Feb chest pain → CABG 20-Feb. T2DM, HTN, ex-smoker."

fields.label: Assessment (A)
fields.helpText: Current overall interpretation. e.g., "Recovering well, no fresh issues, pain controlled."

fields.label: Recommendation (R)
fields.helpText: Action items for the next shift + escalation triggers. e.g., "Continue current orders, dressing change at 20:00, escalate if chest tube output > 100 ml/h."

fields.label: Reassessment (R)
fields.helpText: When and how to reassess. e.g., "Vitals q4h, pain score q4h, neuro check at 22:00."
